prompts: Japanese fantasy RPG guild scene, Ren Starling in cream and mint healer robes and Celestia Vale in a modest travel dress; Ren sits at a wooden tavern table struggling to hold a small, glowing, agitated familiar creature that is fluttering erratically. Celestia watches with concern, leaning in and reaching out her hands to assist. Warm lamplight, cinematic close-up, anime RPG style, no text, no watermark.

Same continuous Japanese fantasy guild shot; Celestia Vale gently places her hands over Ren Starling's, steadying the glowing familiar as it begins to settle down and glow softly. Ren breathes a sigh of relief, sharing a calm, empathetic look with Celestia. Consistent identities and warm tavern lighting, fluid cooperative body motion, no text, no watermark.
